purpose.summary: This copybook defines the data structure for the PCB (Program Communication Block) used in IMS (Information Management System) DL/I (Data Language/I) calls. It contains fields related to database name, segment level, PCB status, processing options, segment name, feedback information, and key feedback area.

paragraphs.purpose: This copybook defines the structure of the Program Communication Block (PCB) used in IMS DL/I calls. The PCB provides information about the database and the results of DL/I operations. PADFL-DBDNAME (line 18) contains the name of the database. PADFL-SEG-LEVEL (line 19) indicates the segment level being accessed. PADFL-PCB-STATUS (line 20) holds the status code returned by the DL/I call. PADFL-PCB-PROCOPT (line 21) specifies the processing options used for the call. PADFL-SEG-NAME (line 23) contains the name of the segment being accessed. PADFL-KEYFB-NAME (line 24) and PADFL-NUM-SENSEGS (line 25) provide feedback information related to the key and number of sensitive segments. PADFL-KEYFB (line 26) is a 255-byte field that holds the key feedback area, containing the concatenated keys of the segments accessed during the DL/I call. This copybook is typically included in programs that interact with IMS databases using DL/I.
paragraphs.dead_code_reason: Record layout 'PADFLPCB' is never used by any program

dead_code.name: PADFLPCB
dead_code.reason: Record layout 'PADFLPCB' is never used by any program
